category_sources: source_facts.description says sqlx-cli is the command-line utility for SQLx, the Rust SQL toolkit; official GitHub repository describes SQLx as a Rust SQL toolkit.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is sqlx-cli; package and executable names in source_facts identify the CLI as sqlx-cli.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository, redirected from source_facts.repo, contains the SQLx README and sqlx-cli package documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/launchbadge/sqlx; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Rust SQL toolkit CLI; official GitHub About text lists SQLx support for PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite and topics include rust, sql, postgres, mysql, sqlite.
